title: Potion Brewing Plus
description: A Fabric mod that simplifies Minecraft brewing. Skip the Nether Wart, just put water bottles and any ingredient in the brewing stand and it works. Buy any potion directly from the built-in Potion Shop for Blaze Rods.
body:
**--Potion Overhaul--**

- No nether wart needed, water bottles automatically convert to awkward potions when an ingredient is placed in the brewing stand
- Potion shop accessible directly from the brewing stand GUI, buy any potion for Blaze Rods
- Every potion in the game available in the shop including all full, splash, lingering, and tipped arrow variants
- Potion shop features a searchable item grid with colored potion icons, hover tooltips showing name and cost, and a purchase receipt tracker
- Pricing scales by potency: regular potions cost 3 rods, full variants cost 4, good potions cost 5, with splash +1, lingering +2, and tipped arrows +1 extra
- Vanilla brewing animation and timer preserved, just the nether wart step is removed

**Made By MaceMeta**
